mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_budget_total WHERE subject_code=#{code} AND budget_year=#{year} AND in_out_type=#{type}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(budget_amount),0) totalBudget,IFNULL(SUM(actual_amount),0) totalActual FROM tb_income_budget_detail WHERE subject_code=#{code} AND budget_year=#{year}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(budget_amount),0) totalBudget,IFNULL(SUM(actual_amount),0) totalActual FROM tb_out_budget_detail WHERE subject_code=#{code} AND budget_year=#{year}
